glosses.ja: 呼ばれる; 意味する

translations.en: We are called Anna and Lukas.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi là Anna và Lukas.
translations.el: Είμαστε η Άννα και ο Λούκας.
translations.ja: 私たちはアンナとルーカスです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (1st person plural).
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1st person plural) expressing naming; takes a predicative name complement.
Proper name functioning as a predicative complement to the verb 'heißen'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two proper names within the complement.
Proper name functioning as the second element of the coordinated predicative complement to 'heißen'.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern heißen Karin und Uwe.

translations.de: Meine Eltern heißen Karin und Uwe.
translations.en: My parents are called Karin and Uwe.
translations.es: Mis padres se llaman Karin y Uwe.
translations.fr: Mes parents s’appellent Karin et Uwe.
translations.it: I miei genitori si chiamano Karin e Uwe.
translations.ru: Моих родителей зовут Карин и Уве.
translations.pt: Meus pais se chamam Karin e Uwe.
translations.tr: Annem ve babam Karin ve Uwe.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi là Karin và Uwe.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders zijn Karin en Uwe.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता करिन और ऊवे हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice to Karin i Uwe.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου είναι η Καρίν και ο Ούβε.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine heter Karin og Uwe.
translations.id: Orang tua saya adalah Karin dan Uwe.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar heter Karin och Uwe.
translations.ro: Părinții mei sunt Karin și Uwe.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče se jmenují Karin a Uwe.
translations.da: Mine forældre hedder Karin og Uwe.
translations.ja: 私の両親はカリンとウーヴェです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the subject noun 'Eltern'.
Plural noun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural) expressing naming; takes a predicative name complement.
Proper name functioning as a predicative complement to 'heißen'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two proper names within the complement.
Proper name functioning as the second element of the coordinated predicative complement to 'heißen'.

sentences.target: Unsere Katzen heißen Mimi und Leo.

translations.de: Unsere Katzen heißen Mimi und Leo.
translations.en: Our cats are called Mimi and Leo.
translations.es: Nuestros gatos se llaman Mimi y Leo.
translations.fr: Nos chats s’appellent Mimi et Léo.
translations.it: I nostri gatti si chiamano Mimi e Leo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的猫叫咪咪和莱奥。
translations.ru: Наших кошек зовут Мими и Лео.
translations.pt: Nossos gatos se chamam Mimi e Leo.
translations.vi: Mèo của chúng tôi tên là Mimi và Leo.
translations.nl: Onze katten heten Mimi en Leo.
translations.hu: A macskáink neve Mimi és Leo.
translations.hi: हमारी बिल्लियों के नाम मिमी और लियो हैं.
translations.pl: Nasze koty nazywają się Mimi i Leo.
translations.el: Οι γάτες μας λέγονται Μιμί και Λέο.
translations.nb: Kattene våre heter Mimi og Leo.
translations.id: Kucing kami bernama Mimi dan Leo.
translations.sv: Våra katter heter Mimi och Leo.
translations.ro: Pisicile noastre se numesc Mimi și Leo.
translations.cs: Naše kočky se jmenují Mimi a Leo.
translations.da: Vores katte hedder Mimi og Leo.
translations.ja: うちの猫はミミとレオです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the subject noun 'Katzen'.
Plural noun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural) expressing naming; takes a predicative name complement.
Proper name functioning as a predicative complement to 'heißen'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two proper names within the complement.
Proper name functioning as the second element of the coordinated predicative complement to 'heißen'.

sentences.target: Heute heißen die Teams Blau und Rot.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈhaɪ̯sən diː tiːms blaʊ̯ ʊnt ʁoːt/

translations.de: Heute heißen die Teams Blau und Rot.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈhaɪ̯sən diː tiːms blaʊ̯ ʊnt ʁoːt/
translations.en: Today the teams are called Blue and Red.
translations.es: Hoy los equipos se llaman Azul y Rojo.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, les équipes s’appellent Bleu et Rouge.
translations.it: Oggi le squadre si chiamano Blu e Rosso.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天队伍叫蓝队和红队。
translations.yue: 今日啲隊叫藍隊同紅隊。
translations.ru: Сегодня команды называются Синие и Красные.
translations.pt: Hoje os times se chamam Azul e Vermelho.
translations.vi: Hôm nay các đội tên là Xanh và Đỏ.
translations.nl: Vandaag heten de teams Blauw en Rood.
translations.uk: Сьогодні команди називаються Сині та Червоні.
translations.hu: Ma a csapatok neve Kék és Piros.
translations.hi: आज टीमों के नाम नीला और लाल हैं.
translations.pl: Dziś drużyny nazywają się Niebiescy i Czerwoni.
translations.el: Σήμερα οι ομάδες λέγονται Μπλε και Κόκκινοι.
translations.nb: I dag heter lagene Blå og Rød.
translations.id: Hari ini tim bernama Biru dan Merah.
translations.sv: Idag heter lagen Blå och Röd.
translations.ro: Astăzi echipele se numesc Albastru și Roșu.
translations.cs: Dnes se týmy jmenují Modří a Červení.
translations.da: I dag hedder holdene Blå og Rød.
translations.fi: Tänään joukkueiden nimet ovat Sininen ja Punainen.
translations.ja: 今日はチームは青チームと赤チームです。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb modifying the clause (time frame).
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural) expressing naming; takes a predicative name complement.
Definite article determiner introducing the subject noun 'Teams'.
Plural noun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Proper name used as a team name; part of the predicative complement to 'heißen'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two team names within the complement.
Proper name used as a team name; second element of the coordinated predicative complement to 'heißen'.
